functions.title: Guide Book #77
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #77§r
§lCurserer Staff§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Uncommon
•§lDropped by§r: Rat Curserer
•§lCraftable on§r: Artifacture Table
•§lStackable§r: 1
•§lDurability§r: 256
•§lMelee Damage§r: 5

•§lMelee Effect§r: Magical Scourge I, Spirit Piercer.
•§lShoot§r: Curserer Magic Missile
•§lProjectile Hit Damage§r: 8
•§lProjectile Area Damage§r: 3 in 3-block radius.
•§lProjectile Effect§r: Magical Scourge I, Spirit Piercer.

•§lCooldown§r: 1.2 §o§8(sec)§r
•§lEnchantable§r: YES
•§lRepairable with§r: Curserer Staff
•Wielding this can repel any nearby cursed mobs.
•Wielding the §lBook of Curses§r on your offhand will enhances the Curserer Staff by

increasing projectile hit damage to 10, projectile area damage to 4, Magical Scourge level, improving projectile velocity and range, and reducing durability loss when used as a melee weapon or digging tool.§’
